entry.title: New: BILL064(24) (Honolulu) — CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Housing, Sustainability, Economy & Health to Housing, Homelessness & Parks Committee.
entry.content:
RELATING TO DOWN PAYMENT LOANS.

Requires that a down payment loan program utilizing City general funds be established. Requires the DCS Director to adopt rules.

Latest action: CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Housing, Sustainability, Economy & Health to Housing, Homelessness & Parks Committee.

View on the council site
